description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious driveway leading to a detached garage. The main building has a gable roof with a central entrance, flanked by symmetrical windows and a small porch area. The property includes a landscaped front yard with a row of evenly spaced trees and a paved walkway, as well as a larger open backyard with additional greenery. The exterior walls are finished in a light tan brick or stone, and the roof is clad in gray shingles. The garage is positioned to the left of the main house, with a car parked in front, and the entire property is enclosed by a perimeter wall. The overall layout is orderly and suburban, with clear separation between the living space, driveway, and garden areas.
description: A single-story tan brick bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. Features include a central entrance, symmetrical windows, and rows of trees along the driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front entrance, driveway, detached garage, and a row of trees lining the front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the bungalow, the full length of the driveway, and the orderly row of trees leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the property, the backyard, and the back side of the bungalow and garage.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a top-down perspective of the front facade, driveway, garage, and the arrangement of trees and garden features.
